# oneTimeToken

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the oneTimeToken mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk one-time-token --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.email <String> --input.password <String> --input.origin <Origin> --input.rememberMe <Boolean>
```

## Examples

### Run oneTimeToken

```bash
csdk one-time-token --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.email <String> --input.password <String> --input.origin <Origin> --input.rememberMe <Boolean>
```
